description: GO curation decision table for UBAC2 showing recommended annotation changes
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 7))
ax.axis('off')

# Title
ax.text(0.5, 0.97, 'UBAC2 (Q8NBM4) — GO Curation Decision Table',
        ha='center', va='top', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Decision table
table_data = [
    ['GO Term', 'Current Status', 'Recommended Action', 'Evidence', 'Confidence'],
    ['GO:0004252\nserine-type\nendopeptidase\nactivity', 'IBA from\nGO_Central\n(GO_REF:0000033)', 'REMOVE\n+ consider NOT\nannotation', 'Pseudoprotease (PMID:23297223)\nNo GxSG in TMs\nNo TM4-TM7\n0/25 orthologs have catalytic', 'VERY HIGH\n(5 convergent\nevidence lines)'],
    ['GO:0043130\nubiquitin\nbinding', 'Not annotated', 'ADD\n(ISS or IDA\nif available)', 'UBA domain (304-344)\nPfam PF00627\nInterPro IPR015940', 'MEDIUM\n(domain-based;\nneeds expt.)'],
    ['Autophagy\nreceptor\nactivity', 'Not annotated\n(MF term)', 'INVESTIGATE\nGO term\navailability', 'LIR motif (275-278)\nGABARAP binding\n(PMID:39284914)', 'HIGH\n(experimental\nevidence exists)'],
    ['GO:0005515\nprotein\nbinding', 'IPI (7 refs)\nAlready annotated', 'RETAIN\nbut not as\nprimary MF', 'Multiple interaction\npartners validated\n(UBXD8, GABARAP, etc.)', 'HIGH\n(well-supported)'],
]

row_heights = [0.06, 0.13, 0.10, 0.10, 0.10]
col_widths = [0.16, 0.14, 0.16, 0.30, 0.14]
x_starts = [0.05, 0.21, 0.35, 0.51, 0.81]
y_start = 0.90

for i, row in enumerate(table_data):
    y = y_start - sum(row_heights[:i])
    rh = row_heights[i]
    
    for j, (cell, width, x) in enumerate(zip(row, col_widths, x_starts)):
        if i == 0:
            facecolor = '#263238'
            text_color = 'white'
            fontweight = 'bold'
            fontsize = 9
        elif i == 1:  # The key row — REMOVE
            if j == 2:
                facecolor = '#FFCDD2'
                text_color = '#C62828'
                fontweight = 'bold'
            else:
                facecolor = '#FFEBEE'
                text_color = '#212121'
                fontweight = 'normal'
            fontsize = 8
        elif i == 2:  # ADD ubiquitin binding
            if j == 2:
                facecolor = '#C8E6C9'
                text_color = '#1B5E20'
                fontweight = 'bold'
            else:
                facecolor = '#E8F5E9'
                text_color = '#212121'
                fontweight = 'normal'
            fontsize = 8
        elif i == 3:  # INVESTIGATE
            if j == 2:
                facecolor = '#FFF3E0'
                text_color = '#E65100'
                fontweight = 'bold'
            else:
                facecolor = '#FFF8E1'
                text_color = '#212121'
                fontweight = 'normal'
            fontsize = 8
        else:
            facecolor = '#F5F5F5'
            text_color = '#212121'
            fontweight = 'normal'
            fontsize = 8
        
        rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y - rh + 0.005), width - 0.01, rh - 0.005,
                                        boxstyle="round,pad=0.003", facecolor=facecolor, 
                                        edgecolor='#B0BEC5', linewidth=0.8)
        ax.add_patch(rect)
        ax.text(x + width/2 - 0.005, y - rh/2 + 0.003, cell,
               ha='center', va='center', fontsize=fontsize, fontweight=fontweight,
               color=text_color, linespacing=1.3)

# Footer
ax.text(0.5, 0.37, 
        'All recommendations are CURATION LEADS requiring curator verification.\n'
        'Primary evidence: PMID:23297223 (pseudoprotease designation), PMID:39284914 (ER-phagy receptor),\n'
        'InterPro IPR061914 (inactive rhomboid classification), 25 orthologs (ancestral catalytic loss).',
        ha='center', va='top', fontsize=9, fontstyle='italic', color='#616161',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#FAFAFA', edgecolor='#E0E0E0'))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('ubac2_go_decision_table.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("GO decision table saved.")
